privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a vendor evaluation report in Apache OpenOffice Writer using synthetic input data. The data is created programmatically in setup_task.sh as a JSON file at /home/ga/Documents/vendor_proposals.json containing four vendors: Titanium Edge Tooling (annual quote 587,400), PrecisionCut International (542,800), Nordic Carbide Solutions (611,200), and Summit Tool & Die Works (498,600). The output document must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/Avalon_Vendor_Eval_2025.odt with minimum size 5000 bytes. Document structure requirements include a Table of Contents, footer page numbers, at least 6 Heading 1 sections, at least 8 Heading 2 subsections, and at least 4 tables for scoring matrix, cost comparison, and related analysis.
